content:
# Project Status

## Overall Progress

Reset on extraction (`archon extract`) from the Algebraic-Jacobian challenge.

This subproject's scope is the Čech computation of higher direct images
(`AlgebraicGeometry.cech_computes_higherDirectImage`, `lem:cech_computes_cohomology`)
and its 12-node dependency cone. See `PROGRESS.md` for the open-obligation inventory and
`STRATEGY.md` for the proof arc. The parent project's prover-execution history and
knowledge base were left behind with the carved-away material; this file will be
repopulated by this subproject's own review phase.

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
- **BUILD-WALL SIZING (iter-086/087): the review machine runs at ~2–4K HB/s (REVISED from initial ~46K estimate; CSILeg 4.8M HB took ~19 min = ~4.2K HB/s; Mid1 5.6M HB >60 min = ~1.5K HB/s under load).** File splits MUST target ≤ 8M HB per file. **iter-087 SPLIT APPLIED**: CSILeg (1583 lines, 28M HB) split into 5 files — Leg (717L, ~4.8M HB), Mid1 (282L, ~5.6M HB), Mid2 (222L, ~5.6M HB), Top (446L, ~8M HB), Aux (234L, ~14.4M HB). Blueprint `% archon:covers` for all 5 files is set. **Build gate status iter-091**: CSILeg.olean PRESENT (Jun 19 08:37); Mid1 elaborating (setup.json 09:40); Mid2/Top/Aux/CHDI absent. CSI.olean+CechAugmentedResolution.olean STALE (Jun 18 19:59, pre-split); will auto-rebuild after Aux. At 2K HB/s: Aux alone ~120 min; full chain ~6–7 hr from Mid1 start. LegAux highest SIGTERM risk — split to 2×117L if lake-build times out. sync_leanok can't restore `\leanok` for main theorem until ALL chain oleans present. **ROOT CAUSE of the iters 088–091 stall (iter-092): LSP elaboration (`lean_file_outline`) is in-memory and NEVER writes oleans — only `lake build`/`lake env lean` does.** 4 iters of LSP-poking-then-waiting could not green the gate; the one olean that appeared each iter came from an actual `lake build`, not the poke. **Fix that WORKS (iter-092): launch a detached `nohup lake build <deliverable>`** — survives the review's 60s SIGTERM because it is past the cache replay. Evidence: 4 fresh oleans (Base 11:26 / Leg 11:45 / Mid1 11:45 / Mid2 12:00) landed in iter-092 vs 0 across iters 088–091. Gate-completion protocol: launch detached lake build → let it run Top→Aux→CSI→CechAugmentedResolution→CHDI → next review confirms CHDI olean + sync_leanok `\leanok` → stage=polish. NEVER LSP-poke for oleans; NEVER edit a chain `.lean` while the build runs (invalidates cache replay). **iter-093/094 — the chain blocker is concrete: `CechSectionIdentificationLegTop.lean` `pushPull_interLegHom_sections` hit a `(kernel) deterministic timeout` (proof term too big for the kernel @ maxHeartbeats 1600000); cascade `unknown constant` on `coreIso_comm_leg`.** Fix = DECOMPOSE (kernel checks each decl independently with opaque refs). **iter-094 APPLIED the decomposition** — extracted `private lemma pushPull_interLegHom_resid` (the post-`hstep` 5-map `eqToHom` residual), main lemma closes by `exact pushPull_interLegHom_resid …`; lean-auditor rates the split faithful + sorry-free (0 must-fix). **BUT NOT YET KERNEL-CONFIRMED:** every iter-094 `lake build` of LegTop was killed (exit **137 = SIGKILL/OOM**, NOT the `timeout` default SIGTERM-143 and NOT a Lean `deterministic timeout`) before LegTop reached a verdict; LegTop.olean still ABSENT. 137-not-143 + many concurrent heavy Archon project builds on the host ⟹ likely **OOM-kill**, so the next iter must run a detached, uninterrupted build (consider `-j1` / off-peak) to a verdict, THEN branch: olean appears → build rest of chain (Aux→CSI→CechAugmentedResolution→CHDI) + `#print axioms coreIso_comm_leg`; `deterministic timeout` actually prints → recurse the decomposition or raise maxHeartbeats on just that decl. Do NOT re-edit LegTop blind before the verdict.
- **MERGE-STUB RESTORATION (iter-081): un-stubbing a `sorry -- MERGE-STUB (build-acceleration); proof preserved below, un-sorry to restore` block = two edits: (1) remove `sorry -- MERGE-STUB` + the `/- MERGE-STUB-PROOF <name>` comment opener; (2) remove the closing `-/` and the surrounding `-/\n<next-decl>` separator.** The preserved proof body is verbatim accurate. LSP confirms goals close; but the ~98-LOC `ORIGINAL PROOF` archive block and stale MERGE NOTE comment must then be cleaned up (lean-auditor flags them as major). `simp [Functor.map_sum, Functor.map_zsmul, CosimplicialObject.whiskerRight]` closed the `mapAlternatingCofaceMapComplexIso` rfl gap (additivity of the alternating coface-map complex functor). lake build consistently times out (~10 min) on CSILeg even after the restorations — the kernel-term-shrink approach works at LSP level but the module is too heavy for turn-time lake builds. Build verification must be a dedicated job (not a prover turn). **Post-restoration cleanup** (must be done by refactor, not review): (a) stale module docstring claiming "Carries the residual sorry `X`" after the sorry is gone; (b) stale MERGE NOTE comment "sorry'd to keep the build green; TODO: restructure" after restructuring is done; (c) dead `/- ORIGINAL PROOF ... -/` archive block; (d) dead MERGE-STUB-PROOF block in CHDI after real proof inserted.
- **CSI BUILD-WALL SOLVED (file split) + heartbeat-wall defeated by abstract-context factoring (iter-074, CSI route sorry 2→1; `backboneIncl_proj` CLOSED & sync_leanok-build-verified).** The iter-073 tooling wall (one 2475-LOC file, inline `lake` OOM/timeout) is gone: the file was split into 3 modules (`CechSectionIdentification`/`…Base`/`…Leg`, ~1100–1500 LOC each), making scratch-validation against a sibling `.olean` tractable and letting edits LAND. **Verification gate that worked:** the prover ran 0 full builds (each ≈27 min); the post-prover `sync_leanok` dependency-aware `lake build` (iter=74, 641 s, +19 `\leanok` −0) IS the kernel-soundness gate — a build failure adds zero markers, so +19 ⇒ the merge compiles. Trust this over an inline 27-min `lake env lean`. **(1) Defeat a heartbeat-elaboration wall by factoring reassociation into ABSTRACT-context lemmas:** `backboneIncl_proj` hit a 12.8M-heartbeat wall from per-layer `congrArg`-prefix re-elaboration on the concrete `cechBackbone_left_sigma` 5-layer decomposition. Fix = prove the reassociation generically (`entry_chain`/`glue_chain` in a clean category context where rw/simp are reliable) + one combo lemma (`ι_reindex_wpci_inv_overWPproj`) in the cheap pre-extensive context; concrete proof becomes `entry_chain ha2 → rw [hexp] (the .inv = its 5 layers by rfl) → glue_chain → exact habs`, `maxHeartbeats 3200000`/`synthInstance 400000`. **(2) `Eq.trans` over `calc`** when intermediate terms are defeq-but-not-syntactic (`(c≫q)_*` vs `q_*c_*`): `calc` triggers `Trans Eq Eq ?m` synthesis at REDUCIBLE transparency → fails; `refine Eq.trans … ?_` unifies at default transparency. `G.map` distributes over `≫` by defeq (`Hom.comp_app` rfl) — `simp [Functor.map_comp]` won't fire on `(sectionFunctorV V).map (a≫b)` and isn't needed. State the all-`F.presheaf.map` target as `have key`; `exact key` (kernel-defeq) — simp does not reliably fire. **(3) image-typed `''ᵁ` goals:** `rw [Scheme.homOfLE_ι]` FAILS motive-not-type-correct (the `IsOpenImmersion` instance rides the open); rewrite the instance-free preimage `⁻¹ᵁ` form via `simp only [← Scheme.homOfLE_ι X hle]`. `@`-explicit application when `IsOpenImmersion` synth fails mid-positional-application. **LAST CSI leaf `pushPull_interLegHom_sections` (Leg:1012):** 5-step restrict-world decomposition (Step 0 `unit_pushforward_rFIP_inv` via `Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`, `rFIP := restrictFunctorIsoPullback`; K5 `restrict_unit_comp`; K4 `pullbackComp_rFIP_compat`; Step 3' `pushPull_toRestrict_comm`; Step 4 `pls_eq`+`thin_resid5`) — **Steps 0–3' scratch-COMPILE; only Step-4 merge pending.** Full route in `task_results/…Leg.lean.md`; blueprint has NO sketch for it (must transcribe before re-dispatch — HARD GATE).
- **OPEN-IMMERSION ROUTE FULLY DONE — STRETCH `_comp` CLOSED + CSI Stub-5 augmentation framework built (iter-066, sorry 9→6).** `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_comp` (`R^k f_*(j_*H) ≅ R^k(j≫f)_*H`) sorry-free + kernel-clean `{propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound}` (lean_verify first-hand); all 4 sub-leaves closed. **`hacyc` (`j_* Iⁿ` is `f_*`-acyclic) UNLOCK = the adjoint-preserves-injectives route, NOT Serre-vanishing-on-`U∩f⁻¹V` (that open is not affine — FLAWED, now moot):** `unfold Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor; exact inferInstanceAs (SheafOfModules.pushforward _).IsRightAdjoint` (**plain `infer_instance` FAILS** — restrictFunctor IS a sheaf-pushforward, a right adjoint) ⟹ `restrictFunctor j` mono-preserving ⟹ `Injective.injective_of_adjoint (restrictAdjunction j)` ⟹ `pushforward j` preserves injectives ⟹ instance `Functor.IsRightAcyclic.ofInjective`. The `pullback j ≅ restrictFunctor j` framing is NOT needed (prover abandoned it). `eRes` = `gCosyzygyIsoCocycles`+`isoOfQuasiIsoAt`+`isoHomologyπ₀` (bypasses `R^0 j_*≅j_*`); `hexact` = `isoRightDerivedObj`+iter-065 `_acyclic`; `transport` = `NatIso.mapHomologicalComplex (pushforwardComp j f)` (LHS defeq). **REUSABLE: functor-on-augmented-complex** `mapHC_augment_iso` (all-`Iso.refl` components, `comm` by `simp [CochainComplex.augment]`) + **augmented-complex iso assembly** `augmentCochainIso` (degree-0 = augmentation-object iso `eY`, degree-(n+1) = `isoApp φ n`, `comm` via `φ.hom.comm`); `Φ.Additive` does NOT resolve via `inferInstance` under a `set Ψ`-abstracted functor — thread `(hΦ:Φ.Additive)` EXPLICITLY + `haveI := hΦ`, and `change Φ.map f ≫ Φ.map (C.d 0 1) = 0` BEFORE `rw [← Functor.map_comp]`. CSI Stub 5 `cechSection_complex_iso` now peels the augmentation (outer body sorry-free, `eY:=Iso.refl _` since the `restrictScalars(𝟙·)⋙toPresheaf` adapter is transparent), reduced to 2 leaves: `coreIso` (non-aug degreewise iso via `pushPull_eval_prod_iso`+`sectionCech_objD_apply`) + `hcompat` (degree-0, near-defeq once adapter unfolds). **SYNC-LEANOK ARTIFACT (NOT laundering):** `lem:open_immersion_pushforward_acyclic` (closed iter-065) and `lem:jshriek_transport_along_iso` (closed iter-060, ~6 iters) lack `\leanok` purely because their `\lean{}` lists `private` (name-mangled, unresolvable) helpers — fix = un-`private` `isAffineHom_of_affine_separated`/`sectionsCorep`/`sectionsCorepPushforward`. `% NOTE:` flags added at both blocks iter-066.
- **NEED#1 CLOSED + CSI Stubs 2/4 axiom-clean (iter-065, sorry 12→9). OpenImm `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_acyclic` (`R^q j_*=0`, j affine open immersion) FULLY sorry-free, kernel-verified `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` — the project's sole stated open-immersion residual is DONE.** The four-iter φ'' "wall" dissolved: **the keystone codomain bridge is DEFINITIONAL, not a 40–80 LOC iso.** `sliceReverseRingMap` (φ'') `:= sliceStructureSheafHom φ.symm (φ.inv⁻¹ᵁ Ui)` — both `Functor.sheafPushforwardContinuousComp` AND `Over.mapForget` are `rfl`, so the corrected-inverse-slice codomain is defeq to the bare `Over.post` codomain; NO bridge morphism. **GENERAL LESSON: before building an explicit transport iso between two pushforward-continuous-functor (or `Over.post`/`Over.map`) codomains, test whether `sheafPushforwardContinuousComp`/`Over.mapForget` collapse it to `rfl` — the explicit-bridge route here burned half a lane on `(Over.map (unitIso.inv.app Uᵢ)).IsContinuous` / `(Over.forget ((𝟭 _).obj Uᵢ)).IsContinuous` synthesis failures (defeq-not-syntactic forms `(𝟭 _).obj Uᵢ` / `(functor⋙inverse).obj Uᵢ`) that never resolve, because the goal was already defeq-closed.** Cascade techniques: (1) **thin opens-morphism naturality** — H1/H2 (`pushforwardSliceAdjunctionH1/H2`) unit/counit squares of a scheme-iso slice adjunction collapse to proof-irrelevance: `φ.inv.c ≫ φ.hom.c` reduces via `Scheme.Hom.congr_app φ.hom_inv_id` (resp `.inv_hom_id`) + `Scheme.Hom.comp_app` to a structure-sheaf restriction along the open identity `φ.hom⁻¹ᵁ φ.inv⁻¹ᵁ W = W`, closed `congr 1`/`Subsingleton.elim` (preorder opens-hom is genuinely thin — auditor + first-hand `#print axioms` confirm NO kernel-soundness trap) then `← RingCat.hom_comp`/`(forget₂).map_comp`/`CommRingCat.forgetToRingCat_map_hom` + `erw key2; rfl`. RENAME: `Scheme.congr_app`→`Scheme.Hom.congr_app`; `Functor.map_id` is `(fun x=>id<$>x)=id` not applicable→`CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id`. (2) **`pushforwardSlicePullbackIso = leftAdjointUniq(…) ≪≫ Iso.refl _`** — Step 2 section identity is rfl-clean once φ'' concrete (both sides `Γ(H, φ.hom⁻¹ᵁ W.left)` by `pushforward_obj_obj`). (3) **empty/initial-scheme zero object `isZero_modules_of_isEmpty`** (new helper, CSI; closes `pushPull_coprod_prod_empty`): `IsZero M` for `M : Z.Modules`, `[IsEmpty ↥Z]` — `(toPresheaf Z).map_injective` + `Functor.map_id`/`map_zero` + `ext U x` + `Subsingleton.elim`, where the section-module Subsingleton MUST be derived as `have h : Subsingleton ↑Γ(M,U) := Module.subsingleton ↑Γ(Z,U) _; exact h` (NOT synthesized on the `toPresheaf`-obj type, and `Module.subsingleton` needs the explicit ring arg + `_`). Coproduct over `PEmpty` is the initial scheme: `rw [← isInitial_iff_isEmpty]; exact ⟨isColimitEquivIsInitialOfIsEmpty Scheme _ (colimit.isColimit _)⟩`. (4) **reindex `coprodToProd_isIso_of_equiv` along `e : α ≃ β`**: source `Sigma.whiskerEquiv e (Iso.refl)`→`u`, `Over.isoMk`→`mIso`; target `Pi.whiskerEquiv e (Iso.refl)`→`prodIso`; match projection-by-projection; close `IsIso.of_isIso_comp_right`. TRAPS: `Sigma`/`Pi.whiskerEquiv` need explicit `(f:=)(g:=)` (metavar codomain); the over-morphism leg `rw [Sigma.ι_comp_map']` FAILS on motive → `simp [Sigma.ι_comp_map']`; the product leg needs `erw [Pi.lift_π]` (syntactic-key vs defeq). (5) **cascade for free**: with all three `coprodToProd_isIso_*` closed, `pushPull_coprod_prod` + Stub 2 `pushPull_sigma_iso` + Stub 4 `pushPull_eval_prod_iso` are axiom-clean with NO extra proof (only `synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 800000` for the HasProduct/HasCoproduct slice-family synth). **`hacyc` (f_*-acyclicity of `j_* Iⁿ`) for the STRETCH `_comp` is a genuinely NEW vanishing result, NOT an instance of `_acyclic`** (Part-1 Serre argument with `G=pushforward f`, affine target opens from `S` not `X`).
- **FINE-GRAINED DECOMPOSITION ITER — CSI Option-step CLOSED + OpenImm hqc monolith WIRED to 4 leaves (iter-064, CSI `coprodToProd_isIso_option` axiom-clean + Stub 2 `pushPull_sigma_iso`/Stub 4 `pushPull_eval_prod_iso` assembled; OpenImm `pushforwardSliceTwoAdjunction`+`pushforward_iso_preserves_qcoh` bodies sorry-free + `case hqc` rewired)**: the prescribed mode-switch (mathlib-build → fine-grained) converted two terminal-wall monoliths into small precise leaves. Project real sorry 9→12 BY DESIGN (decomposition); 3 genuine results closed. Reusable Lean techniques: (1) **erw-vs-rw on push–pull product projections** — `prod.lift_fst`/`prod.lift_snd_assoc`/`Pi.lift_π` over `pushPullObj`/pushforward product objects fire ONLY under `erw` (defeq matching), NEVER `rw`/`simp only` (the syntactic discrimination key distinguishes the `ls`-family from the `legs(some ·)`-family on the codomain `∏`). (2) **beta-redex product mismatch → bind to an fvar**: `coprodToProdMap F (fun a => legs (some a))` carries an UNREDUCED redex differing syntactically from the binary leg `Y₁`; `let ls := fun a => legs (some a)` (fvar, `ls i` not a redex) used in BOTH the binary `Y₁ = Over.mk (Sigma.desc (ls ·).hom)` AND `coprodToProdMap F ls` makes the products syntactically identical. (3) **reverse `← pushPullMap_comp` whnf-timeout (even at 1.6M heartbeats) → forward-fold via `heq`**: prove the over-morphism identity `heq : coprodOverIncl … = _ ≫ _` once, `rw [heq]`, then expand with FORWARD `pushPullMap_comp` (cheap syntactic head-match `pushPullMap F (_ ≫ _)`). (4) **`IsContinuous` on `.symm.functor`/`.symm.inverse` is defeq-not-syntactic** → `pushforwardPushforwardAdj` instance search fails; bridge with explicit `haveI hF/hG : (eqv).symm.functor.IsContinuous … := eqv_inverse_isContinuous …`. (5) **universe pin `SheafOfModules.pullback.{u}` / `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction.{u}`** — both default to universe 0 and break the downstream `Presentation.{u,u,u}` universe match (`Presentation.ofIsIso` then errors `Type 1 vs {u}`). (6) **empty-base `pushPull_coprod_prod_empty`**: both source/target of `coprodToProdMap` over `PEmpty` are terminal; target via `IsTerminal.ofUniqueHom`+`Pi.hom_ext`, source via `Functor.map_isZero (pushforward _)`+`IsZero.isTerminal`, then `isIso_of_isTerminal` — RESIDUAL = `IsZero ((pullback q).obj F)` over the initial/empty scheme `∐ PEmpty` (no Mathlib one-liner; needs presheaf-of-modules IsZero-from-pointwise). **CAVEAT (auditor major, OpenImm:861-862):** `higherDirectImage_openImmersion_acyclic` body is sorry-free but `case hqc` `exact`s `pushforward_iso_preserves_qcoh` which transitively depends on 4 open leaves — `#print axioms` still `sorryAx`; an inline comment said "discharged in full" (should read "modulo the 4 leaf sorries"). NOT a real closure.
- **CSI L2 BINARY NODE + Option-COMBINATOR DONE, OpenImm METAVAR WALL CLEARED (iter-063, CSI `pushPull_binary_coprod_prod`+`pushPull_binary_leg_coherence`+`sigmaOptionIso`; OpenImm `sliceOversEquiv`+`opensEquivOfIso`+`opensMapHomBase_isEquivalence`+both continuity instances, all axiom-clean)**: (1) **prod-lift leg-matching over pushforward objects** — to prove `prod.lift f g` (factors under a `pushforward q`) is iso, match it against a reference chain `(pushforward q).mapIso (asIso coprodDecompMap) ≪≫ PreservesLimitPair.iso ≪≫ prod.mapIso idiso₀ idiso₁` ENTIRELY through `prod.lift` identities: `prod.lift_map` + `prod.comp_lift` + `prodComparison = prod.lift (q_* fst)(q_* snd)` (defeq via `PreservesLimitPair.iso_hom`) + `← Functor.map_comp_assoc` + `coprodDecompMap` unfold + `prod.lift_fst/snd`, trailing `rfl`. **`Category.assoc`/`simp` REFUSE to reassociate `(A≫B≫C)≫prod.fst` over pushforward objects** — `prod.hom_ext`+projection rewrites are a DEAD END. (2) **type-ascribe iso codomains** that emerge only defeq (`pushPullCoprodLegIso` lands in `pushPullObj F (Over.mk Y₀.hom)`, pin to `pushPullObj F Y₀`) or downstream `prod.fst`/`prod.map` rewrites SILENTLY no-op. (3) **leg-coherence `rfl` after `Functor.map_comp`** — `pushPull_binary_leg_coherence` final step is `rw [← hLAU]; simp only [Functor.map_comp, Category.assoc]; rfl`; DROP the `congr 1` (it over-splits into 3 heterogeneous `≍`). Auditor-confirmed this `rfl` is post-normalization syntactic equality, NOT a thin-cat collapse. (4) **`sigmaOptionIso`** `∐ Z ≅ Z none ⨿ ∐ a, Z (some a)` (Mathlib has `sigmaSigmaIso`, NO Option-split): genuine `Iso` record, coherences via `Sigma.hom_ext`/`coprod.hom_ext` + `ι_desc`/`inl_desc`/`inr_desc`. (5) **OpenImm inverse slice-functor continuity** (the `[F.IsContinuous J K]` metavar that stalled iters 060–062 on `pushforwardPushforwardAdj`): `sliceOversEquiv = Over.postEquiv Uᵢ (opensEquivOfIso φ)`; continuity via `Functor.isContinuous_comp` + `GrothendieckTopology.instIsContinuousOverMapOver` (handles `Over.map (unitIso.inv)` for free) + `CoverPreserving.overPost`. **DEFEQ-NOT-SYNTACTIC INSTANCE TRAP:** the topology base object has 3 defeq spellings (`φ.inv⁻¹ᵁ Uᵢ` / `(opensEquivOfIso φ).functor.obj Uᵢ` / `(functor⋙inverse).obj Uᵢ`); instance SEARCH (reducible) fails where ASCRIPTION (`exact`, default transparency) succeeds — build comp-continuity in a `have key` (postEquiv-native syntax, ALL `isContinuous_comp` args/instances via `@` so `isDefEq` unifies), close the outer instance with `exact key`. **WHAT THIS LEAVES — two large understood assemblies (see Known Blockers):** CSI `pushPull_coprod_prod` finite-index induction (~120 LOC / 6 sub-lemmas), OpenImm φ''/H₁/H₂ coherence (the φ'' is object-level CORRECTION-FREE = `(overPullback Vᵢ).map φ.hom.toRingCatSheafHom` + eqToHom, NOT `sliceStructureSheafHom φ.symm`). **GOTCHAS for the planner:** 5 CSI helpers named in public `\lean{}` hints are `private` → `sync_leanok` can't resolve them (iter-063 synced `added=0` despite 2 axiom-clean decls); `isZero_of_faithful_preservesZeroMorphisms` is DUPLICATED under the same fully-qualified name in OpenImmersionPushforward.lean AND CechAugmentedResolution.lean (latent joint-import redeclaration error).
- **DISJOINT-COVER DECOMPOSITION ISO `isIso_coprodDecompMap` DONE + the ψ_r SLICE-RING-MAP infra DONE (iter-062, CSI `isIso_coprodDecompMap`+`isIso_map_prodLift_of_isLimit`; OpenImm `sliceStructureSheafHom`(=ψ_r)+`opensMapInvBase_isEquivalence`+`overPost_slice_isContinuous`+`sliceStructureSheafHom_(pre_)isRightAdjoint`, all axiom-clean)**: closes the iter-061 instance-trap blocker AND clears the OpenImm "genuine wall". (1) **`isIso_coprodDecompMap`** (per-`V` iso of the coproduct decomposition map `M ⟶ inl_*(M|inl) ⨯ inr_*(M|inr)` for `M:(A⨿B).Modules`): the iter-061 FIX worked — `Scheme.Modules.Hom.isIso_iff_isIso_app` → `TopCat.Sheaf.isProductOfDisjoint` on the Ab sheaf `M.presheaf` (opens `inl''ᵁinl⁻¹U`/`inr''ᵁinr⁻¹U`, disjoint via `isCompl_opensRange_inl_inr`+`Scheme.Hom.image_preimage_eq_opensRange_inf`, sup=`U`) → reflect to ModuleCat through `SheafOfModules.evaluation (op U)` + `forget₂ (ModuleCat _) Ab` (reflects limits via `isLimitOfReflectsOfMapIsLimit`; `forget₂.map (G.map u₀) = u₀.app U` is `rfl`) → `isIso_map_prodLift_of_isLimit`. **TRAPS:** `⟨M.presheaf,M.isSheaf⟩.isProductOfDisjoint` dot-notation resolves to the wrong unfolded `FullSubcategory` namespace → call `TopCat.Sheaf.isProductOfDisjoint` qualified with ascription `(... : TopCat.Sheaf Ab _)`; `← Functor.map_comp` will NOT fire on `M.presheaf.map _ ≫ M.presheaf.map _` → rewrite the source `(Opens)ᵒᵖ` hom by `Subsingleton.elim` first, then forward `M.presheaf.map_comp` + closing `rfl`; `infer_instance` won't chain `Functor.map_isIso` from a local `haveI` → `exact Functor.map_isIso _ _`. (2) **`isIso_map_prodLift_of_isLimit`** (general): `G` preserves `P⨯Q` + `IsLimit (BinaryFan.mk (G.map α)(G.map β))` ⟹ `IsIso (G.map (prod.lift α β))` via `prodComparison_fst/snd` + `isIso_prodLift_of_isLimit` + `IsIso.of_isIso_comp_right`. (3) **`sliceStructureSheafHom` (=ψ_r)**: `((Opens.grothendieckTopology X).overPullback RingCat Uᵢ).map φ.inv.toRingCatSheafHom`; codomain matches the sliced pushforward of `𝒪_Y` along `Over.post(Opens.map φ.inv.base)` **by `rfl`** (Beck–Chevalley `Over.post F ⋙ Over.forget = Over.forget ⋙ F` is `rfl`; `sheafPushforwardContinuous` is `F.op ⋙ (·).val`) — NO eqToHom. The opens functor is an equivalence (`Opens.mapMapIso (Scheme.forgetToTop.mapIso φ).symm`), its slice `Over.post` continuous (`compatiblePreservingOfFlat`+`CoverPreserving.overPost`+`coverPreserving_opens_map`). **`IsRightAdjoint` discharge** (the anticipated stall, CLEARED): presheaf `Functor.isRightAdjoint_of_leftAdjointObjIsDefined_eq_top (PresheafOfModules.pullbackObjIsDefined_eq_top.{u} ψ_r.hom)` (universe pin `.{u}` REQUIRED — `Over Uᵢ/Vᵢ` are `SmallCategory`); sheaf-level then `inferInstance` under bumped heartbeats (`maxHeartbeats 4000000`/`synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 2000000`, for the sliced-site `HasWeakSheafify`/`WEqualsLocallyBijective` synthesis).   `Sigma.ι_desc` cannot fire — silently breaking the downstream proof (here CechBridge:251). Instead ADD a
  parallel `section FamilyParameterized` mirroring the chain (`𝒰.I₀ ↦ ι`, `coverOpen 𝒰 ↦ U`,
  `coverInterOpen 𝒰 ↦ coverInterOpenFam U`, names `↦ …Fam`), keeping every `X.OpenCover` decl byte-identical →
  zero downstream regression. The family form subsumes the original up to defeq (`coverInterOpenFam (coverOpen 𝒰)
  σ` is defeq `coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ`), so `…Fam (coverOpen 𝒰)` recovers the `X.OpenCover` statement when needed.

  open-indexed building blocks (`freeYoneda`, `FreeCechEngine.*`, `quasiIso_of_evaluation`) carry no `𝒰`
  dependency and are reused unchanged. (50 axiom-clean `…Fam` decls; `set_option linter.unusedSectionVars false`
  inside the section for combinatorial lemmas that don't use `[Finite ι]`, harmless — the consumer supplies it.)

  Čech-to-cohomology and the Leray spectral sequences with one lemma.

  proof **never touches `conjugateEquiv`**. (The `conjugateEquiv_comp` "mate-of-composite" recipe in

  the goal carries `G.obj (F.obj _)` (definitionally equal, not syntactic). Fix: `simp only
  [Functor.comp_obj] at h1 h2 ⊢` FIRST to align object forms, THEN `reassoc_of%`. This single fix
  on `pushPull_pentagon` (iter-002) unblocked the entire push-pull functoriality cone. The lever is
  object-form alignment, not a stronger rewrite tactic.

  `I_B` of a split SES `0 → I_A → I_B → I_C → 0` of injective resolutions, build it injective-free
  and general first. Given cochain complexes `K, L` and a cocycle family `τ n : L.X n ⟶ K.X (n+1)`
  with `d_L^n ≫ τ(n+1) = -(τ n ≫ d_K(n+1))`, the matrix differential

  `InjectiveResolution.exact_succ`/`exact₀`. (iter-005, all axiom-clean.)

  (both false starts this iter). (`epi_toCycles_of_exactAt`.)
- **Two-step cokernel transport beats a combined square (iter-009)**: to identify
  `coker(homologyMap(Gψ) 0) ≅ coker(G.map ses.g)` when one naturality leg carries the

- **Acyclic-resolution staircase is straight-line `Nat.rec` (iter-009)**: once the leaf isos exist

- **Functoriality via off-the-shelf transport (CechNerve, iter-002)**: once `pushPullFunctor` is a
  genuine functor, build the nerve by lifting the geometric backbone to `SimplicialObject (Over X)`

  and whiskering through the functor via `CosimplicialObject.Augmented.whiskeringObj`, which carries
  both the structure and the augmentation.
- **Constant-coefficient combinatorial Čech contracting homotopy = L3 (iter-015)**: to prove
  positive-degree exactness of an alternating-coface (Čech) complex, model it concretely as
  `Cⁿ = (Fin n → ι) → M` with `[AddCommGroup M]`, differential
  `combDifferential t σ = ∑ⱼ (-1)ʲ • t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)` and homotopy
  `combHomotopy r u τ = u (Fin.cons r τ)` (prepend a fixed index `r`). Then (i) `d∘h+h∘d=id`
  (`combHomotopy_spec`): split `h(d t)` at `j=0` via `Fin.sum_univ_succ` (the `j=0` term gives `t`),
  the rest cancel termwise against `d(h t)` by `Fin.succ_succAbove_succ`-style reindexing + a sign
  flip; (ii) `d²=0` (`combDifferential_comp`): a **sign-reversing involution**
  `(j,i) ↦ (j.succAbove i, i.predAbove j)` on the double sum via `Finset.sum_involution`, using
  `Fin.succAbove_succAbove_succAbove_predAbove` (swap fixes the composite coface),
  `Fin.succAbove_succAbove_predAbove` + `Fin.predAbove_predAbove_succAbove` (it is an involution),
  `Fin.succAbove_ne` (no fixed point). Package as `Function.Exact (d) (d)` (ker⊆im from the homotopy,
  im⊆ker from `d²=0`) to feed `exact_of_isLocalized_span` node by node. This is the intended
  replacement for the (unavailable) simplicial `ExtraDegeneracy`. NOTE: for the localised complex the
  coefficients **vary** (`M_{s_σ s_r}`), so this constant version is the sign/bookkeeping *skeleton*
  that ports verbatim modulo a per-tuple family `A` + a prepend-iso `A (Fin.cons r τ) ≃ A τ`.
- **`d²=0` for free via `alternatingCofaceMapComplex` / `AlternatingFaceMapComplex` (iter-015)**: when
  building a Čech-type cochain (resp. chain) complex, do NOT hand-roll the alternating-sum `d²=0`.
  Build a `CosimplicialObject` (resp. `SimplicialObject`) — a functor out of `SimplexCategory` with
  `map_id`/`map_comp` — and apply Mathlib's `AlgebraicTopology.alternatingCofaceMapComplex` (resp.
  `alternatingFaceMapComplex`); the differential and its nilpotence come for free. The remaining work
  is only the functor laws (a reindexing+restriction-composition proof over tuples). This is the
  pattern the relative `CechComplex` already uses (`CechHigherDirectImage.lean`).
- **Injective transfer across a right adjoint (sheaf ⟹ presheaf of modules, iter-015)**: to show
  `(I : X.Modules) [Injective I] ⟹ Injective ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X).obj I)`, feed
  `CategoryTheory.Injective.injective_of_adjoint` the sheafification adjunction
  `PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.val)` — whose left adjoint
  `sheafification (𝟙 _)` carries a Mathlib `PreservesMonomorphisms` instance, and whose right adjoint
  is `toPresheafOfModules X = SheafOfModules.forget ⋙ restrictScalars (𝟙 _)` by `rfl`. **Gotcha:** the
  one-line term form times out at typeclass synthesis because `X.Modules` and `SheafOfModules
  X.ringCatSheaf` are defeq but not the syntactically-same category instance. Fix:
  `haveI : Injective (C := SheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf) I := ‹Injective I›` (it is `C :=`, not
  `X :=`); then no `maxHeartbeats` bump is needed.
- **Free–Yoneda per-term hom bijection (iter-015)**: `Hom_{PMod(O_X)}(free(yoneda V), F) ≃ F(V)` is
  just `PresheafOfModules.freeHomEquiv.trans CategoryTheory.yonedaEquiv`. This is a bare `Equiv` of
  hom-sets only — to use it in a complex iso it must be upgraded to an `AddEquiv` natural in `F`.
  Mathlib has **no** packaged coproduct/biproduct hom-equiv (`biproduct.homEquiv`, `Sigma.homEquiv`,
  `Cofan.IsColimit.homEquiv`, `coproductHomEquiv` all UNKNOWN); assemble the per-degree
  `Hom(⨁_σ Aσ, F) ≅ ∏_σ Hom(Aσ, F)` manually from `Sigma.ι`/`Sigma.desc` + `Sigma.ι_desc`.
  *Refinement (iter-016): the `AddEquiv` upgrade `freeYonedaHomAddEquiv` is now built — its
  `map_add'` goes via the generator formula `freeYonedaHomEquiv V F ψ =
  (ConcreteCategory.hom (ψ.app (op V))) (ModuleCat.freeMk (𝟙 V))` + `PresheafOfModules.add_app` +
  a `change` to `ModuleCat.Hom.hom` (the term is `ConcreteCategory.hom`, defeq but not syntactic)
  then `ModuleCat.hom_add; rfl`.*
- **Dependent-coefficient combinatorial Čech homotopy (L3 port, iter-016)**: to get exactness of an
  alternating Čech complex whose coefficients *vary* per multi-index (`M_{s_σ}`, away localisations),
  abstract the restriction maps as additive `δ : A m (σ∘j.succAbove) →+ A (m+1) σ` and prepend maps
  `c : A (m+1) (cons r σ) →+ A m σ`, with three compatibility hypotheses: `hu` (unit `c∘δ₀=id`),
  `hsh` (shift `c∘δ_{k+1}=δ_k∘c`), `hcomm` (coface commutation). The alternating-sum cancellation
  (`d∘h+h∘d=id`) and `d²=0` (via the `(j,i)↦(j.succAbove i, i.predAbove j)` sign-reversing involution
  + `Finset.sum_involution`) transfer verbatim from the constant-coefficient case. The only extra
  friction — transport of a cochain value along an index-tuple equality — is isolated to a one-line
  `depTransport` (`subst; rfl`). Live as `CombinatorialCech.Dependent.depDiff_exact : Function.Exact`,
  ready for `exact_of_isLocalized_span` per node. Gotcha: an `omit [...] in` to drop an unused
  instance variable must precede the docstring, not sit between docstring and decl.
- **Simplicial/cosimplicial object over a `Sigma`/`Pi` of representables (iter-016)**: build the
  complex by giving a hand-rolled `SimplicialObject`/`CosimplicialObject` with degree `n` =

  index `∐` (coproduct) = `⨁` (biproduct) — use `∐`; it gives `Hom(∐,F)=∏Hom` directly.

  quasi-iso / acyclicity of such a complex can be proved by exhibiting, for each open `W`, a
  sectionwise contracting homotopy — lift objectwise via this instance.

- **`∏ᶜ`/`op`/`Functor.map` matching needs `erw` + term-mode (iter-018)**: for products and

  characterised by uniqueness. Parameterise by `Inverts`, NOT `a ∣ b` — the Čech prepend (`c`) map's
  source element `s r²·s_σ` does NOT divide the target `s r·s_σ`, only its factors are invertible, so

  fails to infer it. The chain (insertion) differential on `∐_{Fin(p+1)→I} M` is the alternating sum of
  index-dropping reindexings `σ ↦ σ∘Fin.succAbove i` — the chain transpose of the cochain

  (2) **`refine (lemma_term).trans ?_`** instead of `rw [lemma]` — `exact`/`refine` close up to defeq, so

- **Form-B absolute cohomology via `Abelian.Ext` — four reuse-lane idioms (iter-026, `AbsoluteCohomology.lean`,
  10 decls axiom-clean)**: realizing `H^p(U,F) := Ext^p_{X.Modules}(jShriekOU U, F)` with corepresenting
  object `jShriekOU := sheafify(free(yoneda U))` (the `j_!` *functor* is absent from Mathlib; only the
  *object* is needed). (1) **`HasExt` is a `Prop` with THREE universe params** `HasExt.{w, v, u_obj}`
  (w = localized-hom universe). A bare `local instance : HasExt X.Modules := HasExt.standard _` FAILS:
  `w` auto-binds to a fresh rigid universe that won't unify with `u+1`. FIX: pin the triple —
  `HasExt.{u + 1, u, u + 1} X.Modules` (`X.Modules` is `Category.{u, u+1}`, `HasExt.standard` yields
  `w = max v u_obj = u+1`). Make it a `local instance` so every `Ext …` resolves it directly and
  dodges the `HasSmallLocalizedHom` TC-search timeout (Prop ⇒ no diamond). (2) **The category is named
  `AddCommGrpCat`, NOT `AddCommGrp`** — `AddCommGrpCat.of (Ext …)`. (3) **adjunction-`homEquiv`
  additivity via `erw […]; rfl`**: to upgrade `Adjunction.homEquiv` to `≃+`, the `map_add'` goal after
  `simp only [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]` needs `Functor.map_add` (right adjoint `forget ⋙
  restrictScalars` is `Additive` by `inferInstance`) + `Preadditive.comp_add`; both `rw` and `simp only`
  FAIL (defeq-carrier `Preadditive` mismatch), but **`erw [Functor.map_add, Preadditive.comp_add]; rfl`**
  closes it. `Ext.homEquiv₀` additivity: `AddEquiv.mk'` + `simp only [Ext.homEquiv₀_symm_apply,
  Ext.mk₀_add, Ext.mk₀_homEquiv₀_apply]` (or just use the shipped `Ext.addEquiv₀ : Ext X Y 0 ≃+ (X ⟶ Y)`).
  (4) **`Ext.comp` restatement gotchas** when writing covariant-LES wrappers around
  `Ext.covariant_sequence_exact₁/₂/₃`: the degree proof must be an explicit term `add_zero n` (NOT
  `by omega` — omega can't solve `n + 0 = ?c` with `c` a metavariable), and the `∃ x, x.comp … = …`
  binder needs an explicit type annotation `∃ x : Ext (jShriekOU U) S.Xᵢ n, …` or field notation
  `x.comp` can't resolve. Strategic payoff confirmed in-Lean: injective vanishing is the one-liner
  `Ext.eq_zero_of_injective e` because `I` is the SECOND Ext arg — Form-A restriction-preserves-injectives
  is eliminated, not deferred.
